testcase.name: test_create_lead_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_leads_routes_regression.py:136: in test_create_lead_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create lead failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create lead failed: 422 - {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","preferences"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":{"cuisine":"multi-cuisine"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
